summary: Comprehensive testing of Phase A (Quick Win) - Unified Label Upgrade: Identity & Label Switcher. All 14 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified: ULN page loads with Label Switcher in top-right showing 43 labels, Members tab displays members table with role badges, Role Permissions legend shows all 4 roles with descriptions.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend service properly implements role hierarchy: owner(4) > admin(3) > a_and_r(2) > viewer(1)
Last owner protection correctly prevents removal or demotion of the only owner
Auto-add owner on label registration works via ensure_owner_membership() in uln_service.py
Frontend Label Switcher shows all 43 labels with role and member count
Members table displays role badges with proper color coding (amber for owner, blue for admin, green for A&R, gray for viewer)
Add Member modal correctly excludes 'owner' role from selection (can only promote existing members to owner)
Role Permissions legend displays all 4 roles with clear descriptions
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing labels and owner user
context_for_next_testing_agent: ULN Label Members feature fully tested. Backend: All CRUD endpoints working (/me/labels, /labels/{id}/members, /labels/{id}/my-role, /roles, add/remove/update role). Owner protection rules enforced. Frontend: Label Switcher in ULN header shows 43 labels with roles and types, Members tab shows members table with role badges, Add Member modal has email and role fields, Role Permissions legend shows all 4 roles. Test credentials: owner@bigmannentertainment.com / Test1234!

backend_endpoints.GET /api/uln/me/labels: PASS - Returns list of 43 labels with role, name, member_count
backend_endpoints.GET /api/uln/labels/{label_id}/members: PASS - Returns members list with user details
backend_endpoints.GET /api/uln/labels/{label_id}/my-role: PASS - Returns user's role in specific label
backend_endpoints.GET /api/uln/roles: PASS - Returns 4 valid roles with descriptions
backend_endpoints.POST /api/uln/labels/{label_id}/members: PASS - Adds new member by email
backend_endpoints.DELETE (last owner): PASS - Cannot remove the last owner of a label
backend_endpoints.PUT (demote last owner): PASS - Cannot demote the last owner

frontend_components.ULN page loads at /uln: PASS - Shows Unified Label Network dashboard
frontend_components.Label Switcher in top-right: PASS - Shows active label with role and member count
frontend_components.Label Switcher dropdown: PASS - Shows all 43 labels with roles and types
frontend_components.Members tab: PASS - Shows members table with role badges
frontend_components.Add Member button: PASS - Opens modal with email and role fields
frontend_components.Role Permissions legend: PASS - Shows all 4 roles (Owner, Admin, A&R, Viewer) with descriptions

role_hierarchy_verified.owner: Level 4 - Full control over label, can manage all members and settings
role_hierarchy_verified.admin: Level 3 - Can manage members, content, and distribution
role_hierarchy_verified.a_and_r: Level 2 - Can manage catalog, scouting, and artist relations
role_hierarchy_verified.viewer: Level 1 - Read-only access to label data and analytics
